originalBehavior: The published article loads through a shared article shell plus the page-local base and gps scripts, then initializes many inline trilateration, orbital-motion, timing, and signal-processing sections under one longform page.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published article structure, shared article styling, route-local textures, and both vendored scripts while rewriting static-hosting metadata and asset paths for the subpath-hosted replica.
notes: The public body no longer exposes the upstream author banner, blog navigation, analytics, or footer supporter prompt.
The route keeps the original longform article structure instead of condensing the content into a custom local rewrite.
evidence: Implementation planning treated the published article shell, Earth textures, and both scripts as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage verifies the route loads locally, both scripts initialize, and the drag, time, and orbital scenes remain interactive.

originalBehavior: The published article opens with draggable positioning scenes, then steps through time-of-flight, sound-based ranging, clock bias, and pseudorange explanations driven by sliders and synchronized canvases.
localStatus: The local route keeps the early drag scenes, time sliders, and clock-bias demonstrations under the original published runtime.
notes: The route preserves the published transition from visual trilateration to time-based ranging instead of flattening those sections into static diagrams.
The smoke contract treats one early drag scene and one time-slider scene as required parity behavior.
evidence: Post-gears rollout planning explicitly called for one drag scene and one time-slider progression in the GPS pilot.
Shared smoke coverage verifies the early landscape scene responds to drag and a drone timeline slider updates the rendered output.

originalBehavior: The published article continues through orbit period, geosynchronous motion, GPS constellation views, and Keplerian-element scenes with slider-driven globe and orbit geometry updates.
localStatus: The local route keeps the orbital-period, inclination, and related geometry sections intact through the original article canvas and slider runtime.
notes: The published WebGL Earth scenes now load their texture assets from the route-local GPS image tree instead of the upstream root path.
In-body Ciechanowski article links are rewritten locally when available or neutralized when the target route is not shipped yet.
evidence: Implementation planning treated one orbital or inclination scene as parity-critical for the second Bartosz pilot.
Shared smoke coverage verifies an orbital-inclination scene updates from slider input without runtime asset failures.

originalBehavior: The published article closes with atmospheric delay, navigation-message, PRN, and signal-correlation scenes, followed by an upstream footer that includes supporter messaging and author provenance.
localStatus: The local route keeps the later signal sections through the original scripts while leaving the shared footer as the only public original-page reference surface.
notes: The local copy uses local fallback font stacks so the route does not depend on runtime Google Fonts requests.
The public body no longer includes the Patreon footer prompt or other author-promo surfaces.
evidence: The hardened Ciechanowski audit now flags ordinary in-body upstream article links while allowing footer-only provenance.
Shared smoke coverage verifies the route stays responsive and runtime-clean without upstream asset dependencies.
